alternatives.label: Compression stockings
alternatives.narrative: Wearing compression stockings to manage symptoms without a procedure.

benefits.label: Symptom relief
benefits.narrative: Improves aching, heaviness and swelling in the leg.

benefits.label: Appearance
benefits.narrative: Improves the appearance of the visible veins.

checkpoints.text: I understand that deep vein thrombosis is a possible complication.

complications.label: Skin staining
complications.narrative: Brown discolouration over the treated vein, usually fading over months.

complications.label: Deep vein thrombosis
complications.narrative: A clot in a deeper vein; uncommon but potentially serious.

declarations: I have read or been given information about the procedure.
I understand the expected benefits, risks and alternatives.
I have had the opportunity to ask questions.

informational: Some procedures use implants or are recorded in national registries.

responses.prompt: I agree to my details being recorded in the relevant national registry.

optional_sections.title: Medical devices and registries

procedures.name: Ultrasound-guided foam sclerotherapy for varicose veins
procedures.narrative: A fine needle is used to inject a foam into the affected vein under ultrasound guidance, sealing it closed.

answers.answer: Yes — this is done under local anaesthetic and you can drive afterwards.

questions.question: Will I be able to drive home?

render.signing_statement: I confirm that I have had the opportunity to discuss this procedure, understand the benefits, risks and alternatives, and agree to proceed.
